markdownRemark.html:
Crawl Results

  • Sources checked: 4 (Hetzner, RunPod, RackNerd, DigitalOcean)
  • All sources OK — no fetch errors or timeouts
  • Deals updated: 45 total (Hetzner: 5, RunPod: 4, RackNerd: 3, DigitalOcean: 2, plus existing curated deals)

Data Validation

  • Deal count: 45 ✅ (≥30 threshold)
  • Bundle count: 8 ✅ (≥5 threshold)
  • Bad entries: 0 — all deals have valid pricing
  • Note: 3 free-tier deals (Vercel Hobby, Netlify Free, Cloudflare Workers Free) have monthly: 0; domain deals use annual pricing; AI API deals use inputPer1M/outputPer1M — all valid schemas

Build Status

  • gatsby clean ✅
  • gatsby build --prefix-paths ✅ — 58 pages generated
  • rewrite-paths.sh ✅ — 60 HTML files fixed, __PATH_PREFIX__ injected, webpack c.p="/deals/"

Deploy Status

  • container-build.sh ✅
  • Main site: 618 pages
  • Deals site: 58 pages
  • Deployed to GitHub Pages at 06:02 UTC

Live Verification

  • https://solo.engineer/deals/ → HTTP 200 ✅
  • https://solo.engineer/page-data/deals/page-data.json → HTTP 200 ✅
  • Main site root (Bobbie Intelligence) → intact ✅

Issues

None. Clean run across all steps.
